zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Blackaller於1490年出生在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特時，她的父親Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter31歲，母親Alice Andrews26歲。她於1509年5月1日與William Periam在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1553年在她的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Blackaller于1490年出生在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特时，她的父亲Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter31岁，母亲Alice Andrews26岁。她于1509年5月1日与William Periam在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1553年在她的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blackaller

variants.name: Blackler
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from a place in Devon named Blackler, from Old English blæc ‘black’ + alor ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Blackaller was born in 1490, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter, was 31 and her mother, Alice Andrews, was 26. She married William Periam on 1 May 1509, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1553, in her hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Blackaller est née en 1490, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Andrews, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Periam le 1 mai 1509, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1553, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Blackaller 1490 in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter 31 und ihre Mutter Alice Andrews 26. Sie hat am 1. Mai 1509 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland William Periam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1553 im Alter von 63 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Blackaller è nata il nel 1490 nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice Andrews, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Periam il 1 maggio 1509, nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1553, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Blackallerが1490年にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeterは31歳，母Alice Andrewsは26歳であった。1509年5月1日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーでWilliam Periamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1553年に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Blackaller(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Andrews(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1509년 5월 1일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 William Periam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Blackaller nasceu em 1490, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Andrews, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Periam em 1 de maio de 1509, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1553, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Blackaller родилась в 1490 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Andrews, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Periam 1 мая 1509 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1553 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace Blackaller nació en 1490, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Andrews, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William Periam el 1 de mayo de 1509, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1553, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
